name: Pidmon

signature_move.name: Fire Feather
signature_move.description: Showers its feathers, which burst into holy flames, like meteors.

description: An "Angel Digimon" with two wings, whose body is clad in shining white cloth. Although it is a being of perfected virtue like Angemon , its rank is below Angemon's. However, its power is on par with Angemon, and it is a being that destroys evil while wielding its Holy Rod . Its Special Moves are showering its feathers, which burst into holy flames, like meteors ( Fire Feather ), and charging at tremendous speed, and then unleashing an intense blow with the Holy Rod ( Pid Speed ).
